reviews.review_description: Can’t pick up the racket or ball

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review. Please make sure that the Quest guardian floor is at the physical floor level. We are not seeing this issue on our side (on a Quest 2). If you still notice this problem, please describe which device you are using in an email to uralstech@gmail.com
Please try reinstalling the app. We are not seeing this issue on our side (on a Quest 2). Please describe which device you are using in an email to uralstech@gmail.com

reviews.review_description: I didnt like this, theres no ‘scenery’ or court.. and when you hit the ball it just disappears..

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review. We will add the court soon. Click on the trigger button to get the ball back to your position. Make sure you have a roomscale guardian. Please send a video if the problem persists and tell us which device you are using in an email to info@uralstech.in

reviews.review_description: Can't even pick up racket to play? Needs work.

developer_response.body: Please try reinstalling the app. We are not seeing this issue on our side (on a Quest 2). Please describe which device you are using in an email to uralstech@gmail.com
